Gordian I Africanus (March-April AD 238). AR denarius (22mm, 3.06 gm, 11h). NGC Choice XF★ 5/5 - 4/5, Fine Style. Rome. IMP M ANT GORDIANVS AFR AVG, laureate, draped, and cuirassed bust of Go
sales.description:
Ancients
Gordian I Africanus (March-April AD 238). AR denarius (22mm, 3.06 gm, 11h). NGC Choice XF★ 5/5 - 4/5, Fine Style. Rome. IMP M ANT GORDIANVS AFR AVG, laureate, draped, and cuirassed bust of Gordian I right, seen from behind / P M T-R P COS P P, Gordian I standing facing, head left, togate, branch in raised right hand, transverse baton in left. RIC IV.II 1. Stunningly fine detail with gunmetal toning. 

An enduring mystery is the excellent quality of the Roman coinage of Gordian I and I...
